LanguageData.ELIFUH-1YVTransport.label: UH-1Y Venom (Transport)
LanguageData.ELIFUH-1YVTransport.description: DESCRIPTION: The UH-1Y is a helicopter designed for general medium range transport of goods and personnel. BASIC STATS: Health: 700 LOGISTICS POTENTIAL: Cargo Capacity: 800kg Speed: 5.5 Passenger Capacity: 1-6 Fuel Per Tile: 6 Fuel Capacity: 480 Round Trip Range: 40 Full Range: 80 Internal Power: 700w ATTACK POTENTIAL: Bombing Run Capacity: n/a Precision Run Capacity: n/a Spread: n/a Distance between drops: n/a
